settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Connection, device, appearance, language, and desktop remote control
settings.search.label: Filter settings sections
settings.section.connection.label: Connection
settings.section.device.label: Device

settings.section.language.label: Language
settings.section.desktop.label: Desktop
settings.section.files.label: Files
settings.fileAccess.title: Remote file access
settings.fileAccess.description: AuraGo agents may only read or write folders you explicitly allow.
settings.fileAccess.enable: Allow file access for remote agents
settings.fileAccess.disabledHelp: When disabled, agodesk does not advertise file capabilities in session.start and rejects file_list/file_read/file_write/file_search.
settings.fileAccess.roots.label: Display name
settings.fileAccess.negotiated.title: Negotiated with AuraGo
settings.fileAccess.negotiated.reconnect: Allowed locally, but AuraGo did not adopt file capabilities. Saving triggers reconnect; if chips stay red, check AuraGo session.start / advertised_capabilities handling.
settings.section.shell.label: Shell
settings.shellAccess.title: Remote shell
settings.shellAccess.description: Allows AuraGo to run shell commands on this computer inside allowed working directories.
settings.shellAccess.disabledHelp: Disabled by default: agodesk does not advertise remote.shell.exec and rejects shell_exec.
settings.shellAccess.requireCwd: At least one working directory is required before remote shell can be enabled.
settings.shellAccess.cwds.label: Display name
settings.shellAccess.negotiated.title: Negotiated with AuraGo
settings.shellAccess.negotiated.reconnec: Enabled locally, but AuraGo did not adopt remote.shell.exec. Saving triggers reconnect.
settings.section.speech.label: Speech
settings.section.about.label: About
settings.connection.websocket.title: WebSocket server
settings.connection.websocket.descriptio: AuraGo endpoint for chat, pairing, and desktop commands.
settings.connection.serverUrl.label: Server URL
settings.connection.serverUrl.help: Path must end with /api/agodesk/ws. Loopback dev: ?insecure_loopback=1
settings.connection.status.title: Connection status
settings.connection.status.label: Status
settings.connection.origin.label: Origin
settings.connection.transport.label: Transport
settings.connection.session.label: Session
settings.device.title: Device & pairing
settings.device.description: Paired devices authenticate via HMAC reconnect.
settings.device.deviceId.label: Device ID
settings.device.sessionId.label: Session ID
settings.device.pairingStatus.label: Pairing status
settings.device.hostname.label: Hostname
settings.device.platform.label: Platform
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.description: Theme for chat, banners, and settings.
settings.language.title: Interface language
settings.language.description: App UI language. Independent of Gemini speech input language.
settings.appearance.uiSounds.title: UI sounds
settings.appearance.uiSounds.description: Subtle sounds for messages and connection status. Independent of Gemini Live voice output.
settings.appearance.minimizeToTray.help: When enabled: closing or minimizing hides the window — agodesk stays connected. Click the tray icon or "Open agodesk" to restore. "Quit" in the tray menu fully exits the app.
settings.appearance.showWindowHotkey.hel: Global shortcut to bring agodesk back visible and maximized from the tray or after minimizing. Default: Alt + Shift + G (rarely used by other apps).
settings.appearance.showWindowHotkey.rec: Hold at least one modifier (Alt, Ctrl/Cmd, or Shift) and press a key. Esc cancels.
settings.appearance.showWindowHotkey.cap: Invalid combination — use at least one modifier plus a letter, number, or function key.
settings.appearance.showWindowHotkey.res: This shortcut is often reserved by the system. Please choose another one.
settings.openpets.title: OpenPets desktop pet
settings.openpets.description: Controls the external OpenPets app over local IPC while the agent works. OpenPets must be installed separately and running in the system tray.
settings.openpets.requirement: Requirement: OpenPets desktop app is running (https://openpets.dev).
settings.openpets.pet.label: Agent pet
settings.openpets.pet.help: Optionally target a specific installed pet for agodesk leases.
settings.openpets.status.unavailable: OpenPets is unavailable. Please start the desktop app.
settings.desktop.title: Desktop control
settings.desktop.description: Screenshots and input are executed natively via Tauri.
settings.desktop.disabledHelp: When disabled, screenshots and remote input are blocked locally and AuraGo will not receive desktop capabilities on the next connection.
settings.desktop.status.label: Desktop control
settings.desktop.screenshots.label: Screenshots
settings.desktop.input.label: Mouse / keyboard
settings.desktop.remoteControl.label: Remote control
settings.desktop.approvalHelp: Input, UI actions, and browser automation require local approval in the remote control banner (top of window). Screenshots and UI trees do not.
settings.desktop.auragoApprovalWarn: Important: The device must be approved for remote control in AuraGo. Without approval the agent responds with "device is not approved" and cannot request screenshots.
settings.desktop.discovery.label: Discovery
settings.desktop.discovery.value: Displays, windows, active window, host info
settings.desktop.uiAutomation.label: UI automation
settings.desktop.uiAutomation.value: Accessibility tree and semantic element actions
settings.desktop.browser.disabledHelp: Separate consent for browser control via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Requires desktop control to be enabled.
settings.desktop.browser.setupHelp: Start Chrome or Edge with a debug port (e.g. chrome.exe --remote-debugging-port=9222) or use auto-launch (default on connect). Only loopback (127.0.0.1) endpoints are allowed.
settings.desktop.browser.label: Browser automation
settings.desktop.browser.value: Only after local approval; separate from desktop input
settings.desktop.browser.testUnavailable: Available in the desktop app only (not in browser dev mode).
settings.speech.title: Speech & voice recognition
settings.speech.description: Choose Google Gemini Live, hybrid (local listen, online speak), or fully offline.
settings.speech.provider.gemini_live.hin: Best conversation quality · API key · Internet
settings.speech.provider.hybrid.title: Hybrid
settings.speech.provider.hybrid.hint: Local recognition · Online voice · No Google
settings.speech.provider.offline.title: Fully offline
settings.speech.provider.comingSoon: Hybrid and offline modes will be enabled in phase B/C (agodesk-speech sidecar).
settings.speech.localVoiceResponsesHelp: Spoken replies via local TTS (Piper or online voice in hybrid mode).
settings.speech.hybridTtsBackend.label: TTS (hybrid)
settings.speech.hybridTtsVoice.label: Hybrid voice
settings.speech.offlineTtsVoice.label: Offline voice (Piper)
settings.speech.localAsrModel.label: Local recognition model
settings.speech.localAsrModel.whisperRec: Whisper is recommended for the selected app language.
settings.speech.localAsrModel.senseVoice: SenseVoice is recommended when the app language is Japanese or Chinese.
settings.speech.asrStatus.ready.whisper_: Whisper Small ASR model found and ready.
settings.speech.asrStatus.downloadHint: Select the model above — download starts automatically.
settings.speech.ttsStatus.downloadHint: From project root: npm run download:speech-tts
settings.speech.ttsTest.label: Test speech output
settings.speech.ttsTest.placeholder: Sample text for the read-aloud test…
settings.speech.ttsTest.edgeHint: Edge TTS requires internet. Piper fallback is disabled when Edge TTS is selected.
settings.speech.ttsTest.piperHint: Install Piper voices: npm run download:speech-tts (an installed voice is picked automatically)
settings.speech.ttsTest.piperMissing: No Piper voice installed. Run npm run download:speech-tts or switch TTS to Microsoft Edge (online).
settings.speech.voiceResponsesHelp: Native audio models can respond by voice (24 kHz PCM). Response text also appears as a chat message.
settings.speech.agentModeConflict: Speech agent is active — disable it, or enable auto-send (automatically disables the agent).
settings.speech.agentMode: Speech agent with tool use (AuraGo actions)
settings.speech.modeExclusionHelp: Auto-send and speech agent are mutually exclusive: either send raw transcripts to AuraGo, or let Gemini decide via tools when and what to send.
settings.speech.agentModeHelp: In agent mode, Gemini recognizes commands and sends them to AuraGo via tools (screenshots, desktop actions, chat).
settings.speech.manualEditHelp: When auto-send is disabled, transcripts land in the input for editing.
settings.speech.modelId.label: Model ID
settings.speech.language.label: Language
settings.speech.voiceName.label: Gemini Voice
settings.speech.bargeInMode.label: Barge-in mode (interrupt while AI speaks)
settings.speech.bargeInMode.help: Energy: simple volume detection. Silero: robust ML voice detection (better without headphones, downloads model on first use). Auto: prefer Silero, fall back to energy.
settings.speech.apiKeyHelp: The API key is stored in the OS keyring, not in app settings. Model can be adjusted (e.g. gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview or gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-preview-12-2025).
settings.speech.apiKey.title: Google API key
settings.speech.apiKey.freeKeyPrompt: Get a free API key here:
settings.speech.apiKey.error.testNoKey: Please enter or save an API key first.
settings.speech.apiKey.error.testGeminiO: Connection test applies to Google Gemini Live only.

settings.about.version.label: Version
settings.about.protocol.label: Protocol
settings.about.endpoint.label: Endpoint
update.banner.title: Update available
update.banner.description: Version {version} is available. Install now to stay up to date.
update.toast.upToDate: agodesk is already up to date.
settingsPreset.loopbackMock.label: Loopback (mock)
settingsPreset.loopbackDefault.label: Loopback (default)
settingsPreset.loopbackDefault.descripti: Default dev URL from app settings
settingsPreset.auragoLan.label: AuraGo LAN
statusBar.openSettings.title: Open settings
statusBar.desktop.disabled.title: Desktop control is disabled in settings
statusBar.remote.ready.title: remote.desktop.capture reported in session.start
statusBar.remote.missing.title: No remote.desktop.capture — please reconnect or re-pair
statusBar.theme.toggle.title: Theme: {theme}
statusBar.settings.title: Settings
statusBar.overflow.title: More actions
statusBar.voiceOutput.on.title: Voice output on
statusBar.voiceOutput.off.title: Voice output off
messageList.empty.title: Welcome to agodesk
messageList.empty.description: Your desktop chat for AuraGo. After connecting, the agent can reply — and with your approval, take screenshots.
inputBox.send.title: Send (Enter or Ctrl+Enter)
inputBox.footnote: Enter to send · Ctrl+Enter to send · Shift+Enter for line break
inputBox.footnoteWithAttachments: Enter to send · Ctrl+Enter to send · Shift+Enter for line break · Drag & drop files
inputBox.attachments.add.title: Attach file
inputBox.attachments.error.fileTooLarge: A file exceeds the size limit.
inputBox.attachments.error.totalTooLarge: Attachments exceed the total size limit.
inputBox.attachments.negotiationPending: Attachments not fully negotiated yet (AuraGo must send chat.attachments in session.accepted). Reconnect.
pairing.title: Pair device with AuraGo
pairing.description: Create an enrollment token in AuraGo and paste it here. After successful pairing, agodesk reconnects automatically.
pairing.token.hide.title: Hide
pairing.token.show.title: Show
remoteControl.description.active: The agent may control mouse and keyboard. Screenshots are independent. You can revoke input access at any time.
remoteControl.description.pending: An agent wants to send input on your desktop. Screenshots do not require approval.
shellApproval.title: Approve shell command?
shellApproval.description: AuraGo wants to run a command on this computer.
certModal.intro: The connection to AuraGo could not be established due to a TLS problem. Pairing and chat are independent — the certificate must be verified first.
certModal.host.label: Host
certModal.subject.label: Subject
certModal.issuer.label: Issuer
certModal.validUntil.label: Valid until
certModal.fingerprint.label: SHA-256 fingerprint
speechBanner.recognizing.label: Recognizing:
speechBanner.active.agent: Speech agent active — commands are sent to AuraGo via tools
speechBanner.active.autoSend: Live speech active — transcripts are sent to AuraGo
speechBanner.vad.loading: Loading voice detection model (first use may take a moment)…
messageBubble.copy.title: Copy
chatMessageBody.copyCode.title: Copy
windowControls.minimize.title: Minimize
chatView.connectionLost: Connection lost. The pending request was cancelled.
chatView.hint.pairRequired: Please pair the device before chatting.
chatView.history.title: History
chatMedia.stl.noViewer: STL preview is not available in AgoDesk.
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.embed.title: Integration
integrations.embed.unavailable: Embedded preview is unavailable. Open the integration in your browser.
warnings.title: System warnings
chatView.stop.label: Stop
chatView.stop.title: Cancel response
chatOutbound.error.conversationNotReady: Chat session is not ready yet. Please wait a moment.
settings.chatTtsMode.title: Chat voice output (AuraGo)
chatView.remoteDesktop.missing: Remote desktop is not registered in AuraGo (remote.desktop.capture missing in session.start). Click "Reconnect" in the status bar or unpair and pair again.
chatView.remoteControl.prompt: The agent wants to control mouse and keyboard. Please click "Approve" in the yellow banner above — screenshots are independent.
chatView.shellApproval.prompt: AuraGo wants to run a shell command. Review and confirm in the shell banner.
chatView.shellApproval.sessionStopped: Session disconnected after shell command rejection.
chatView.error.showWindowHotkey: Could not register the show-window hotkey (it may already be used by another app).
chatView.error.speechTranscriptFailed: Could not send speech transcript to AuraGo.
chatView.error.remoteApprovalFailed: Could not grant remote control locally.
chatView.error.attachmentsNotSupported: Attachments are not available with this server. AuraGo must send chat.attachments (in addition to chat.media_upload) in session.accepted. Reconnect after the server has been updated.
chatView.remoteControl.approvedWithCaptu: Remote control granted (screenshot capture available.) AuraGo can now send desktop.command.
chatView.remoteControl.approvedNoCapture: Remote control granted (screenshot capture unavailable.) AuraGo can now send desktop.command.
notifications.title: agodesk — new message
speechFlow.error.disabled: Speech recognition is disabled in settings.
speechFlow.error.noMicrophone: Microphone is not supported in this environment.
speechFlow.error.noApiKey: No Gemini API key stored. Please save one in settings.
speechFlow.error.vadSileroFailed: Silero voice detection could not be loaded. Using energy mode instead.
speechFlow.error.vadSileroFallback: Silero model could not be loaded: {message}. Falling back to energy mode.
speechFlow.error.hybridNotImplemented: Hybrid speech mode could not be started.
speechFlow.error.offlineNotImplemented: Offline speech mode could not be started.
speechFlow.error.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected — please speak a bit longer and more clearly.
speechDelivery.devAsrNotice: Offline speech active (dev mode): ~{duration} ms of audio captured. No real sherpa-onnx model installed yet — spoken words are not transcribed.
chatOutbound.error.attachmentsNotSupport: Attachments are not available with this server. AuraGo must send chat.attachments (in addition to chat.media_upload) in session.accepted. Reconnect after the server has been updated.
chatPlan.title: Plan
